Creates raw states under devices.<device: Sozdaet syrye sostoyaniya v devices.<device>.raw.dp_<id>. Dostupnye dlya zapisi syrye sostoyaniya sleduyut oblachnomu dpMode i polezny dlya diagnostiki.
Leave empty to use the first courtyard r: Ostavte pustym, chtoby ispolzovat pervyy dvor, vozvrashchennyy oblakom iGarden. Esli dvorov neskolko, ukazhite nuzhnyy ID iz zhurnala adaptera.
